text: I was charged $49.99 twice this billing cycle. Please investigate and issue a refund immediately.
My subscription was cancelled without my consent and I was charged an early termination fee.
I cannot find my invoice for last month. I need it for reimbursement from my company.
What payment methods do you accept? I would like to switch from credit card to PayPal.
Does the annual plan include a discount compared to paying monthly? I want to renew.
The API returns 500 errors on all POST requests since the update this morning. Production is down.
Data export is broken — the CSV file is completely empty despite having over 10,000 records.
The mobile app crashes on iOS 17 when trying to upload any file larger than 10MB.
Search results take 30 seconds to load. It used to respond in under 1 second.
The dark mode button in settings does not persist between sessions.
My account was compromised. I see login attempts from Russia. Please lock the account immediately.
All my project data was deleted after I upgraded my plan. I need it restored urgently.
I cannot change my email address. The verification email never arrives in my inbox.
How do I add a team member to my organization? The invite button appears grayed out.
I would like to update my display name and profile picture. Where is that setting located?
Order #78234 was marked as delivered three days ago but I never received it. It contained expensive hardware.
Wrong item delivered: I ordered a laptop stand but received a mouse pad. Need urgent replacement.
My package has been stuck in transit for two weeks with no tracking updates.
I need to change the delivery address for my order. It has not shipped yet.
Can I upgrade my shipping to express? I placed the order about two hours ago.
